Class CLI

  • java.lang.Object
    • CLI

  • public class CLI
extends java.lang.Object
    This is my code! It's goal is function as the Command Line Interface for the Search Engine CS 312 - Assignment 9
    Version:
    1.0 12/10/2018
    Author:
    Jack A. Cannon

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void buildSE(java.lang.String[] args)
      buildSE method - processes the command line arguments (including creation of SE object)
      static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
      main Method - initializes the program (provides CLI arguments)
      void query()
      query Method - when called allows user to perform unlimited queries (timing operation occurs here) Expected Complexity: O(1)
      void usage()
      usage Method - prints out a help page for interaction with the se Expected Complexity: O(1)

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        main Method - initializes the program (provides CLI arguments)
        Parameters:
        String[] - arguments as provided by user Expected Complexity: O(1)

      • buildSE

        public void buildSE(java.lang.String[] args)
        buildSE method - processes the command line arguments (including creation of SE object)
        Parameters:
        String[] - arguments as provided by user Expected Complexity: O(N)

      • usage

        public void usage()
        usage Method - prints out a help page for interaction with the se Expected Complexity: O(1)

      • query

        public void query()
        query Method - when called allows user to perform unlimited queries (timing operation occurs here) Expected Complexity: O(1)
